parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 restart parity — a training gap of 30 days (>= 28) drives effectivePhase.activePhase='restart' with a restart-specific volume floor. sessionIntent='reentry-productive' but the restart phase + multiplier distinguish it from a 14-27d reentry. No legacy-advice contamination.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. Last completed session is 30 days before the clock so getEffectiveTrainingPhase returns the 28+d restart branch.
